generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T DEMATIUM PETRÆUM. P. Conferva aurea. A fungus of the family of moulds. Preparation , Tincture. Authority. Hering, Archiv. f. Hom., 13, 2, p. 184. ► Slight cutting in the abdomen. ► Stool soft, afterwards thick (after half an hour). ► Tobacco had not its natural taste, although it destroyed the bitter taste of the medicine. ► Strong sexual desire.
